items.headline: Why Amphenol (APH) Stock Is Trading Up Today
items.summary: Shares of electrical connector manufacturer Amphenol (NYSE:APH) jumped 3.3% in the afternoon session after yields tumbled as the Trump Administration announced a new peace deal that would lead to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

items.headline: Amphenol (APH) Stock After 67% Annual Surge Are Growth Expectations Getting Stretched
items.summary: Investors may be wondering if Amphenol stock is fairly priced at around US$153.80, or if the recent excitement has pushed it too far for comfort. The stock has returned 10.8% over the last week, 23.4% over the past month, 10.1% year to date and 67.5% over the last year, with a very large 3 year and 5 year return profile that has caught many investors' attention.
